name: index_elemwise_fusion
description: Test the index/Elemwise fusion work on pytensor's gather_scatter_fusion branch (commits e927333b6f45..cb1e83df518d). Adds IndexedElemwise plus the FuseIndexedElemwise rewriter ("fuse_indexed_into_elemwise"), which folds AdvancedSubtensor1/AdvancedSubtensor reads and AdvancedIncSubtensor1/AdvancedIncSubtensor writes into a single vectorized numba Elemwise loop, avoiding intermediate materialization. Compared against index_elemwise_fusion_base (the parent of the first commit in the range) to isolate the fusion change.
